query_title: Homeless to Harvard: The Liz Murray Story

recommendations.title: The Pregnancy Pact
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the true story of teenagers at Gloucester High School who agreed to get pregnant at the same time.

recommendations.title: Return to Zero
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of a successful couple, Maggie and Aaron who are preparing for the arrival of their first child.

recommendations.title: Nowhere to Be Found
recommendations.overview: A mother's worst nightmare comes true when her teenage daughter goes missing.

recommendations.title: Stuart: A Life Backwards
recommendations.overview: Story about the remarkable friendship between a reclusive writer and illustrator and a chaotic homeless man, whom he gets to know during a campaign to release two charity workers from prison.

recommendations.title: Too Young to Die
recommendations.overview: An abused 15 year old is charged with a murder that carries the death penalty in this fact-based story.

recommendations.title: Believe Me: The Abduction of Lisa McVey
recommendations.overview: On the night she plans on taking her own life, 17-year-old 'Lisa McVey' is kidnapped and finds herself fighting to stay alive and is raped. She manages to talk her attacker into releasing her, but when she returns home, no one believes her story exce

recommendations.title: 100 Meters
recommendations.overview: Based on the incredibly true story of a Spanish man with Multiple Sclerosis who tried to finish an Iron-Man: 3,8km swimming, 180km cycling and 42 running. And he was told that he could not make 100 meters.

recommendations.title: Brimstone
recommendations.overview: In the menacing inferno of the old North-American West, Liz is a genuine survivor who is hunted by a vengeful preacher for a crime she didn’t commit.

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: This Is England
recommendations.overview: A story about a troubled boy growing up in England, set in 1983. He comes across a few skinheads on his way home from school, after a fight. They become his new best friends, even like family. Based on experiences of director Shane Meadows.
